requirement_topic.en: Chad Grid Connection for BESS — SNE, 220/380 V 50 Hz, and Project-Specific Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 乍得BESS并网——SNE、220/380 V 50 Hz与项目专属并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: 乍得BESS併網——SNE、220/380 V 50 Hz與項目專屬併網要求

summary.en: BESS installations in Chad that connect to the utility grid are generally handled under SNE and ministry-led project workflows. Chad’s public grid nominally operates at 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) and 50 Hz. This nominal match with China is favourable for baseline conversion settings, but protection coordination, ride-through thresholds, reactive-power strategy, fault levels, and communications must be confirmed for each project before commissioning. Where specifications are present, IEC 62933 and IEC 62619 are often used as expected technical references.
summary.zh: 乍得接入电网的BESS一般由SNE及能源主管流程管理。乍得电网名义参数为220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）及50 Hz，与中国一致，在基础参数上有利于缩短配置周期，但项目保护协调、穿越阈值、无功控制、故障水平和通信接口仍需在每个项目中于并网前确认。若项目文件涉及，IEC 62933和IEC 62619常作为技术参考。
summary.zht: 乍得接入電網的BESS一般由SNE及能源主管流程管理。乍得電網名義參數為220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）及50 Hz，與中國一致，在基礎參數上有利於縮短配置周期，但專案保護協調、穿越閾值、無功控制、故障水平和通訊接口仍需在每個項目中於併網前確認。若項目文件涉及，IEC 62933與IEC 62619常作為技術參考。

standards_or_laws: SNE utility-project workflow for grid-connected BESS acceptance
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems
IEC 62619:2022 — cell/module safety standard expected in project-level reviews

summary.en: China’s grid-connection baseline for BESS uses GB/T 36558-2023 and GB/T 34120-2017, while PCS and converter testing uses NB/T 42090-2016. The same 220/380 V 50 Hz nominal context means many electrical defaults are familiar, but project-level acceptance in Chad still needs explicit local coordination documentation, metering assumptions, and environmental derating confirmation.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网基线以GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2017为主，储能变流器测试用NB/T 42090-2016。名义上乍得与中国同为220/380 V 50 Hz，许多电气默认参数具有可比性，但乍得项目级验收仍需提交本地配合文件、计量假设和环境降额确认。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網基線以GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2017為主，儲能變流器測試用NB/T 42090-2016。名義上乍得與中國同為220/380 V 50 Hz，許多電氣預設參數具有可比性，但乍得項目級驗收仍需提交本地配合文件、計量假設和環境降額確認。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范
GB/T 34131-2023 — 电力储能用电池管理系统技术要求
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程

gap.en: Gap: the key practical gap is not nominal voltage compatibility — China and Chad already align at 220/380 V 50 Hz. The key gaps are project-specific confirmation of protection settings, reactive support requirements, harmonic limits, metering points, and thermal derating under Chad summer conditions. Chinese documentation should be mapped to each SNE/Tender acceptance scope.
gap.zh: 差距：关键差距不是电压频率匹配问题——中国和乍得名义上均为220/380 V 50 Hz。关键差距在于项目级确认保护设置、无功支撑要求、谐波限值、计量点位，以及乍得夏季工况下的热降额。中国文件需要映射到每个SNE或招标验收范围。
gap.zht: 差距：關鍵差距並非電壓頻率匹配——中國和乍得名義上均為220/380 V 50 Hz。關鍵差距在於項目級確認保護設置、無功支撐要求、諧波限制、計量點位，以及乍得夏季工況下的熱降額。中國文件需要映射到每個SNE或招標驗收範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SNE or project acceptance route is required for grid-connected BESS; project-specific grid-connection evidence is necessary
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection certificates are useful engineering references but not transfer documents for Chad project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Voltage and frequency are a favourable starting point, but all BESS projects in Chad still need SNE/project-specific grid settings and commissioning validation for protection, metering, and thermal behavior before approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电压和频率是有利起点，但乍得所有BESS项目仍需在SNE和项目验收中确认保护、计量及热行为参数后才能通过批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電壓和頻率是有利起點，但乍得所有BESS項目仍需在SNE和項目驗收中確認保護、計量及熱行為參數後才能通過批准。
